title: Per-Skill EMA Aggregation

story.iWant: to accumulate per-call `skill_*` CallScores into a stable running per-skill score on CallerTarget
story.soThat: ACHIEVE goal progress (#417) reads a smoothed, idempotent value instead of the volatile last-call score

context.applies: After any MEASURE spec has scored a `skill_*` parameter
assumptions: Wizard-generated MEASURE specs (`skill-measure-<playbook>`) emit CallScore rows with parameterId matching `skill_*`
CallerTarget.currentScore is the canonical 'where you are' value for the ACHIEVE goal derivation chain
Idempotency is preserved via CallerTarget.lastScoredAt high-water mark

parameters.name: Per-Skill EMA Aggregation
parameters.description: Folds every new `skill_*` CallScore into the matching CallerTarget.currentScore via time-decay EMA. Half-life and first-call cap come from the SKILL_MEASURE_V1 contract; per-playbook override via `playbook.config.skillScoringEmaHalfLifeDays`.

notes: This spec has no triggers — `ema_to_caller_target` is purely an aggregation rule. The aggregate-runner picks the spec up by `outputType=AGGREGATE, isActive=true` like any other AGGREGATE spec.

Writes to CallerTarget rather than LearnerProfile / CallerAttribute because per-skill running scores are consumed by ACHIEVE goal progress (calculateSkillAchieveProgress), which expects a single `currentScore` per parameter.
Idempotency: each CallerTarget tracks `lastScoredAt` as a high-water mark. Re-running the pipeline with force=true (per #405) does not double-apply scores.
